item.title: FoodiePlan
item.description: A meal planning web app built with Next.js, MongoDB, and Google OAuth. FoodiePlan leverages Gemini AI to generate personalized recipe suggestions and weekly meal plans based on user preferences, dietary restrictions, and available ingredients.

item.title: Research Assistant
item.description: Under the guidance of Prof. An-Zi Yen, I delved into a lecture-abstract-based question generation system project, where we fine-tuned an LLM on self-collected datasets. Our demo system’s performance has outperformed state-of-the-art models, and I led the authorship of a paper accepted at IJCAI. We also focused on error detection in math problems and achieved improvements through our proposed self-refinement framework.

item.title: E-QGen: Educational Question Generation
item.description: A lecture abstract-based question generation system optimizing the preparation process for educators in academic lectures. Given a lecture abstract, E-QGen generates potential student inquiries. This demo paper was accepted by IJCAI 2024 at Jeju.

item.title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern
item.description: Contributed to the development of an “AI Customer Service Chatbot” by integrating retrieval-augmented generation with automated workflows, creating an end-to-end chatbot solution. Also incorporated LLM agents into existing systems to streamline audience targeting and promotional workflow creation using intuitive, natural language commands.

item.title: Flyte Open Source Contributions
item.description: Collaborating with open-source community members worldwide to implement features and fix bugs. Contributions focus on enhancing dataclass support and features that strengthen the usability of Flyte and its Python SDK Flytekit. Over 15 pull requests and 1000+ lines of code contributed.

item.title: My Personal Website started!
item.description:
The idea of creating a personal website has been on my mind for several years. After much consideration and effort, I am excited to announce that I have finally launched my personal website! In the near future, I plan to publish engaging articles and blogs here.

I want to express my gratitude to Hugo and the many helpful blogs and videos that guided me through the process. Thanks to these resources, the very first version of my website is now live! My goal is to publish new blog posts every week to document my journey and share valuable insights.
